## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Internal refactor

## Validation

- [ ] `composer lint`
- [ ] `composer test`
- [ ] `PAYTABS_RUN_LIVE_TESTS=1 composer test` (only when relevant)

## Security and Data Safety

- [ ] No API keys/tokens/PAN/CVV committed
- [ ] Webhook signature verification behavior preserved or improved

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated README / docs usage pages if behavior changed
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md

## Notes for Reviewers

Any areas that need special attention.
